headlines.description: — Troy Melton allowed one hit in six innings and the Detroit Tigers' offense came alive late in a 4-1 victory over the Chicago White Sox on Saturday.

headlines.description: — Sal Stewart tied a career high with six RBI and the Cincinnati Reds pulled away for a 10-2 rout of the New York Yankees on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sal Stewart ties career high with six RBIs and Reds rout Yankees 10-2

headlines.description: — Kazuma Okamoto hit a three-run home run to cap a five-run eighth inning and the Toronto Blue Jays rallied from a five-run deficit to beat the Chicago Cubs 8-6 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Okamoto hits a 3-run homer as the Blue Jays rally past the Cubs 8-6

headlines.description: — Manny Machado hit a three-run homer, his 13th this season, in the 10th inning and tied his season high of five RBI, helping the San Diego Padres rally for a 6-4 victory over the Texas Rangers on Saturday.

headlines.description: — Ozzie Albies hit two homers, including a walk-off, two-run blast in the ninth inning to give the Atlanta Braves a 4-3 come-from-behind win over the Milwaukee Brewers on Saturday.

headlines.description: — Max Meyer allowed two runs in five innings to win his eighth consecutive decision to start the season, Heriberto Hernández homered and the Miami Marlins beat the San Francisco Giants 6-3 on Saturday for their seventh straight victory at home.
headlines.shortLinkText: Meyer wins 8th straight decision to start season as Marlins beat Giants 6-3
